issues_encountered: Python 提取 HTML 后整页落在单行 L1：所有 cross_check_anchors 共用 L1，但每条 verbatim 短语在文件中唯一可独立反查。Brief 阶段如升级，需按 H2/H3 重新切句生成行号锚点。

cross_check_anchors.verbatim: Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that reads your codebase, edits files, runs commands, and integrates with your development tools.
The Model Context Protocol (MCP) is an open standard for connecting AI tools to external data sources.
CLAUDE.md is a markdown file you add to your project root that Claude Code reads at the start of every session.
the Agent SDK lets you build your own agents powered by Claude Code's tools and capabilities
Each surface connects to the same underlying Claude Code engine, so your CLAUDE.md files, settings, and MCP servers work across all of them.
